query: SELECT u.role, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM proyecto_usuarios pu LEFT JOIN users u ON pu.usuarioId = u.id WHERE pu.proyectoId = 1 AND pu.activo = 1 GROUP BY u.role;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3B47TRBhQthMPN1.da4a966d722d --database LjHhpq7m8HsaWSJ2BF6kdt --execute SELECT u.role, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM proyecto_usuarios pu LEFT JOIN users u ON pu.usuarioId = u.id WHERE pu.proyectoId = 1 AND pu.activo = 1 GROUP BY u.role;
